description: Audit log dashboard: process lifecycle, file access, network connections, signals

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as time, event_type, count() as count FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${event_type}' = 'All' OR event_type = '${event_type}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT event_type as label, count() as value FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT if(login_name = '', 'unknown', login_name) as login_user, count() as count FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${event_type}' = 'All' OR event_type = '${event_type}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') GROUP BY login_user ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT comm, count() as count FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${event_type}' = 'All' OR event_type = '${event_type}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND comm != '' GROUP BY comm ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, rule, pid, ppid, comm, exec, args, cgroup, uid, is_root FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'exec' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${comm_search}' = '' OR comm LIKE '%${comm_search}%' OR exec LIKE '%${comm_search}%' OR args LIKE '%${comm_search}%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, rule, pid, comm, exit_code, oom_killed, cpu_ns / 1000000000.0 as cpu_sec, rss_max_bytes / 1048576 as rss_max_mb, uptime_seconds, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'exit' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${comm_search}' = '' OR comm LIKE '%${comm_search}%') AND (exit_code != 0 OR oom_killed = 1) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Abnormal Process Exits (exit_code != 0 or OOM killed)

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, pid, comm, exec, rss_max_bytes / 1048576 as rss_max_mb, oom_score_adj, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type IN ('exit', 'oom_kill') AND oom_killed = 1 AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, rule, pid, comm, file_path, file_read_bytes, file_write_bytes, file_open_count, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'file_close' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${comm_search}' = '' OR comm LIKE '%${comm_search}%') AND ('${file_search}' = '' OR file_path LIKE '%${file_search}%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT file_path, count() as access_count, sum(file_write_bytes) as total_write, sum(file_read_bytes) as total_read, groupUniqArray(10)(comm) as processes FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'file_close' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${file_search}' = '' OR file_path LIKE '%${file_search}%') AND file_write_bytes > 0 GROUP BY file_path ORDER BY total_write DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT file_path, count() as access_count, uniqExact(pid) as unique_pids, groupUniqArray(10)(comm) as processes FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'file_close' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${file_search}' = '' OR file_path LIKE '%${file_search}%') GROUP BY file_path ORDER BY access_count DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, rule, pid, comm, net_local_addr || ':' || toString(net_local_port) as local, net_remote_addr || ':' || toString(net_remote_port) as remote, net_conn_tx_bytes as tx_bytes, net_conn_rx_bytes as rx_bytes, net_duration_ms / 1000.0 as duration_sec, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'net_close' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${comm_search}' = '' OR comm LIKE '%${comm_search}%') AND ('${net_search}' = '' OR net_remote_addr LIKE '%${net_search}%' OR net_local_addr LIKE '%${net_search}%' OR toString(net_remote_port) LIKE '%${net_search}%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT timestamp, hostname, comm, sec_remote_addr || ':' || toString(sec_remote_port) as source, sec_local_addr || ':' || toString(sec_local_port) as destination, rule, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'syn_recv' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${net_search}' = '' OR sec_remote_addr LIKE '%${net_search}%' OR sec_local_addr LIKE '%${net_search}%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT timestamp, event_type, hostname, comm, pid, sec_remote_addr || ':' || toString(sec_remote_port) as remote, sec_local_addr || ':' || toString(sec_local_port) as local, rule FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type IN ('tcp_retrans', 'rst_sent', 'rst_recv') AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, pid as sender_pid, comm as sender_comm, sig_num, sig_target_pid, sig_target_comm, sig_code, sig_result, rule, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'signal' AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') AND ('${rule}' = 'All' OR rule = '${rule}') AND ('${user}' = 'All' OR login_name = '${user}') AND ('${comm_search}' = '' OR comm LIKE '%${comm_search}%' OR sig_target_comm LIKE '%${comm_search}%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT timestamp, hostname, login_name, pid as sender_pid, comm as sender, sig_num, sig_target_pid, sig_target_comm as target, rule, cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND event_type = 'signal' AND sig_num IN (9, 15) AND ('${hostname}' = 'All' OR hostname = '${hostname}') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT hostname FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY hostname
list.name: hostname
list.query: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT hostname FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY hostname

list.definition: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT event_type FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY event_type
list.name: event_type
list.query: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT event_type FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY event_type

list.definition: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT rule FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY rule
list.name: rule
list.query: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT rule FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY rule

list.definition: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT login_name FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND login_name != '' ORDER BY login_name
list.label: Login user
list.name: user
list.query: SELECT 'All' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT login_name FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND login_name != '' ORDER BY login_name

title: Audit Log
